commands.review_summary:
The PR adds reasoning-enabled checks to the direct OpenAI completions parser and the agent transport stream parser so reasoning deltas are not appended when model reasoning is disabled.

PR surface: Source +8. Total +8 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current request builders can disable thinking while `model.reasoning` remains true, and the proposed parser gate checks only `model.reasoning`. I did not run a live provider reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor revision plus after-fix real provider proof are needed; the missing external proof keeps this out of an automated repair lane.
